text: CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 1 Introduction

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 1 Introduction > 1.1 Purpose:
This <Project Name> Contingency Plan establishes procedures to recover the <Project Name> following a disruption. Objectives include maximizing effectiveness of contingency operations, identifying critical activities and resources, assigning responsibilities, and providing guidance for recovery and coordination among stakeholders.

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 1 Introduction > 1.2 Applicability:
The <Project Name> Contingency Plan applies to the functions, operations, and resources necessary to restore and resume normal operations. It is applicable to <organization name> and all associated personnel as identified in this document.
CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 1 Introduction > 1.3 Scope

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 1 Introduction > 1.3 Scope > 1.3.1 Planning Principles:
[Enter various assumptions/variables taken into account when developing this plan, or that the successful execution of this plan is dependent upon]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 1 Introduction > 1.3 Scope > 1.3.2 Assumptions:
This section identifies statements believed to be true and from which a conclusion was drawn to define this plan.
1. [Insert description of the first assumption.]
2. [Insert description of the second assumption.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 1 Introduction > 1.3 Scope > 1.3.3 Constraints:
This section identifies any limitation that must be taken into consideration regarding the content of this plan.
1. [Insert description of the first constraint.]
2. [Insert description of the second constraint.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 1 Introduction > 1.4 Reference Requirements:
This plan complies with <organization name>’s IT contingency planning policy and other applicable federal and departmental policies, including but not limited to:
· Computer Security Act of 1987
· OMB Circular A-130 (Appendix III)
· Federal Preparedness Circular (FPC) 65
· Presidential Decision Directives (PDD 67, PDD 63)
· FEMA Federal Response Plan (FRP)
· Defense Authorization Act (Public Law 106-398)
CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 2 Concept of Operations

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 2 Concept of Operations > 2.1 System Description and Architecture:
[Provide a general description of system architecture and functionality, including operating environment, physical location, user base, external partnerships, and backup procedures.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 2 Concept of Operations > 2.2 Line of Succession:
[Enter names and contact information, in order of succession, of individuals responsible for decision-making during disruption.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 2 Concept of Operations > 2.3 Responsibilities:
[List individuals, teams, or departments responsible for recovery operations, including leadership, coordination, and communication procedures.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 3 Notification and Activation:
[Address initial actions to detect and assess damage caused by a disruption, notification options, assessment procedures, alternate options, and activation criteria.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 4 Recovery Operations:
List procedures for all recovery options to restore normal operations and execute each option.

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 4 Recovery Operations > 4.1 Recovery Goal 1:
Recovery Objective: [Enter recovery objective.]
Name: [Enter name]
Contact Information: [Enter contact information]
Responsibility: [Enter responsibility]
Other: [Enter other relevant information]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 4 Recovery Operations > 4.2 Recovery Goal 2:
Recovery Objective: [Enter recovery objective.]
Name: [Enter name]
Contact Information: [Enter contact information]
Responsibility: [Enter responsibility]
Other: [Enter other relevant information]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 4 Recovery Operations > 4.3 Recovery Goal 3:
Recovery Objective: [Enter recovery objective.]
Name: [Enter name]
Contact Information: [Enter contact information]
Responsibility: [Enter responsibility]
Other: [Enter other relevant information]
CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 5 Return to Normal Operations

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 5 Return to Normal Operations > 5.1 Concurrent Processing:
[Outline procedures to test and operate systems concurrently at original and contingency sites until systems are stable.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > 5 Return to Normal Operations > 5.2 Plan Deactivation:
[Outline procedures for deactivating contingency sites, handling sensitive materials, packaging equipment, and restoring to normal locations.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > A APPENDIX A: Contingency Plan Approval:
The undersigned acknowledge they have reviewed the <Project Name> Contingency Plan and agree with the approach presented. Changes will be coordinated with and approved by the undersigned or designated representatives.
Signature:
Date:
Print Name:
Title:
Role:

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > B APPENDIX B: REFERENCES:
The following table summarizes the documents referenced in this document.
Document Name and Version | Description | Location
<Document Name and Version Number> | [Provide description] | <URL or path>

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > C APPENDIX C: KEY TERMS:
The following table provides definitions for terms relevant to this document.
Term | Definition
[Insert Term] | [Provide definition of the term used in this document.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > D APPENDIX D: PERSONNEL CONTACT LIST:
[Insert list of key personnel and contact details.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > E APPENDIX E: VENDOR CONTACT LIST:
[Insert list of vendors, points of contact, and support details.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > F APPENDIX F: EQUIPMENT AND SPECIFICATIONS:
[Insert detailed equipment and technical specifications.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > G APPENDIX G: SERVICE LEVEL AGREEMENT:
[Reference or attach related SLA documents.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > H APPENDIX H: MEMORANDUM OF UNDERSTANDING:
[Reference or attach MOU agreements related to the plan.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > I APPENDIX I: STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURES:
[Insert or reference applicable SOPs.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > J APPENDIX J: BUSINESS IMPACT ANALYSIS:
[Include results or references to Business Impact Analysis reports.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > K APPENDIX K: RELATED CONTINGENCY PLANS:
[List related contingency or continuity plans.]

CDC_UP_Contingency_Planning_Template > L APPENDIX L: OCCUPANT EVACUATION PLAN:
[Insert or reference evacuation plans.]

section_title: APPENDIX M: CONTINUITY OF OPERATION PLAN
text:
